message: Harden NVS student edits: send changed fields only, require current NVS enrollment, use centre eligibility, and keep batch replacement program-scoped.
Make LMS dropout program-specific: close only the selected program while another current program keeps the student active; show multi-program students in every applicable program.
Issue #199 makes NVS one-by-one Student Addition Centre-free and replaces APAAR input with the revised PEN canonical contract while keeping DB Service ownership server-derived.
Issue #200 serves the supplied NVS workbook as a gated static asset and derives Grade per upload row so XLSX and rejected CSV share the canonical mixed-grade path.

NVS existing-Student Edit authorization now proves current NVS Batch membership without Centre data; the LMS filters locked fields and sends canonical changed fields plus server-derived context to the atomic DB Service endpoint.
Review #202: centralize partial edit canonicalization in student-addition-fields and require current NVS Batch evidence before showing Edit.
NVS dropout now reuses the Centre-free existing-Student gate, accepts only explicit NVS intent, and proxies server-derived Student ID or PEN with safe upstream errors.
Recorded Playwright manual QA evidence for revised NVS student addition and the NDA batch configuration prerequisite.
Applied staging QA feedback: explicit period handling for names, visible add errors, board-first roll entry, NDA batch metadata, and identifier-aware success messaging.
